title: FiveHerbQuickCurry
description: A herbal, dense Algerian dish featuring Chinese five spice powder and cure, dairy-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add Chinese Five Spice Powder, Turmeric Powder, Cumin Seeds, Fennel Seeds, and Coriander Seeds. Toast for about 30 seconds.
Crush ginger and garlic finely with a mortar and pestle or use a food processor to make paste.
Stir in the paste into the seeds mixture, then add sliced onions and continue to cook until they are translucent.
Pour in hot water (about 2 cups) over the herbs, making sure everything is submerged. Let it simmer for about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low and let it simmer gently for another 10-15 minutes or until you get a dense consistency.
Turn off heat, cover with a lid and allow to sit for at least 5 more minutes before serving.
